messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The extension dev-host launcher is macOS-only, so `./swarm ensure` can never repair the extension on the Linux/WSL host the swarm actually runs on
What it solves: THE DEFECT, VERIFIED IN CODE 2026-07-14. `extension/scripts/start-extension-dev.sh` ->
`start-extension-dev.js` is the one and only programmatic way to bring up the Extension Development
Host, and every stage of its launch path is macOS-specific:
  - line 23: `VSCODE_APP` defaults to `/Applications…
How it works: The dev host is launched by the editor's own command line on every supported platform
